memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< Expression > left, std::shared_ptr< Expression > right, Args &&... args)
memberdef.name: And

briefdescription.para: Create an AND expression.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< Expression > left, std::shared_ptr< Expression > right, Args &&... args)
memberdef.name: Or

briefdescription.para: Create an OR expression.
Create a NOT expression.

simplesect.para:
A negated expression with optimizations applied:
not(true) returns false
not(false) returns true
not(not(x)) returns x

briefdescription.para: Create a bucket transform term.
Create a year transform term.
Create a month transform term.
Create a day transform term.
Create an hour transform term.
Create a truncate transform term.
Create a transform expression.

Create a COUNT(*) aggregate.

Create a MAX aggregate for an unbound term.

Create a less than predicate for an unbound term.

Create a less than or equal predicate for an unbound term.
Create a greater than predicate for a field name.

Create a greater than or equal predicate for an unbound term.

Create a not equal predicate for a field name.
Create a not equal predicate for an unbound term.

Create a starts with predicate for an unbound term.

Create an IN predicate for a field name.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< UnboundTerm< B > > expr, std::vector< Literal > values)
memberdef.name: In

briefdescription.para: Create an IN predicate for an unbound term.
Create an IN predicate for a field name with initializer list.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< UnboundTerm< B > > expr, std::initializer_list< Literal > values)
memberdef.name: In

briefdescription.para: Create an IN predicate for an unbound term with initializer list.
Create a NOT IN predicate for a field name.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< UnboundTerm< B > > expr, std::vector< Literal > values)

briefdescription.para: Create a NOT IN predicate for an unbound term.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< UnboundTerm< B > > expr, std::initializer_list< Literal > values)
memberdef.name: NotIn

briefdescription.para: Create a NOT IN predicate for an unbound term with initializer list.
Create a predicate with operation and single value.

memberdef.argsstring: (Expression::Operation op, std::string name, std::vector< Literal > values)
memberdef.name: Predicate

briefdescription.para: Create a predicate with operation and multiple values.

memberdef.argsstring: (Expression::Operation op, std::string name, std::initializer_list< Literal > values)
memberdef.name: Predicate

briefdescription.para: Create a predicate with operation and multiple values.
Create a unary predicate (no values).

memberdef.argsstring: (Expression::Operation op, std::shared_ptr< UnboundTerm< B > > expr, std::vector< Literal > values)
memberdef.name: Predicate

briefdescription.para: Create a predicate for unbound term with multiple values.

memberdef.argsstring: (Expression::Operation op, std::shared_ptr< UnboundTerm< B > > expr, std::initializer_list< Literal > values)
memberdef.name: Predicate

briefdescription.para: Create a predicate with operation and multiple values.
Create a unary predicate for unbound term.
Return the always true expression.
Return the always false expression.
Create a named reference to a field.
Create a literal from a value.
Fluent APIs to create expressions.
